## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Daniel Lopes and Marcel Santilli's company fwd.digital, exploring roles, compensation, and business strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong product-market fit for fwd.digital's AI-powered marketing automation tools](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Agreed on Daniel joining for 4 days/week initially at pro-rated $250k/year salary](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Rapid customer acquisition and positive feedback, but need to improve quality and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Considering future funding options (friends/family vs VC) to fuel growth](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Topics

### Current Business Status and Growth

  - [Experiencing strong product-market fit and rapid customer acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [$400k in bank, recently approved for $130k credit line](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [3 new customers this week, 30+ inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Customers extremely enthusiastic after demos](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Running into some quality issues, need to improve systems and processes](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [3-month contract cycles create some unpredictability](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

### Team and Operations

  - [7 full-time remote employees (\~$3k/month each)](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Using Upwork freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Jimmy (in Toronto) managing account managers effectively](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Marcel not taking a salary, reinvesting in the business](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Product and Technology

  - [Need to build flexibility and efficiency into product](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Considering ways to make the AI process more transparent/explainable](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Potential to create self-serve options in the future](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Business Strategy

  - [Debating bootstrap vs. funding approach](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Possibility of friends/family round (\~$2M) to reduce pressure](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Long-term potential for larger VC round if pursuing "$1B idea"](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Focus on building for current clients/use cases quickly](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Workshops generating leads and potential for digital products/revenue streams](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### Daniel's Role and Compensation

  - [Initially joining for 4 days/week equivalent](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Salary set at pro-rated $250k/year (4/5 of $250k)](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Flexibility to increase involvement as needed](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [Will start Monday (presumably Sept 18, 2023)](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)

### Administrative Details

  - [Need to determine best way to classify/pay Daniel (1099 vs. W-2)](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - Will set up <growth@fwd.digital> email and add to systems
  - [Marcel researching options (QuickBooks vs. Remote.com)](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to set up Daniel's email and system access](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Research and decide on payment/classification method](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Daniel to review existing documentation in Notion, Fathom recordings](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
  - [Schedule in-person strategy session in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Daniel to connect with Jimmy and core team members](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Begin work on Monday, focusing on improving product quality and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/ZpqtyGcDx_oeULZw8t3yFHnA7RYgHS2j?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
